mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dashboard_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}

SELECT scan_id, session_id, turn_id, message_id, employee_id, role, message_timestamp, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_write_tokens, total_tokens, cost_total, provider, model, stop_reason, duration_ms, is_error, error_message, tool_name, tool_call_id, parent_id, is_system, created_at FROM dashboard_message WHERE turn_id = #{turnId} ORDER BY message_timestamp ASC
